OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CONNECTOR_INTERVAL.description: The interval (in seconds) for data gathering from Urlscan.

CONNECTOR_LOOKBACK.description: How far to look back in days if the connector has never run or the last run is older than this value.

URLSCAN_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: Whether to create indicators for each observable processed.

URLSCAN_UPDATE_EXISTING_DATA.description: Whether to update existing data if an entity already exists.

URLSCAN_DEFAULT_TLP.description: The TLP marking to apply to indicators and observables.

URLSCAN_DEFAULT_X_OPENCTI_SCORE.description: The default x_opencti_score to use across observable and indicator types.

URLSCAN_X_OPENCTI_SCORE_DOMAIN.description: The x_opencti_score to use for Domain-Name observables and indicators. Defaults to the default score if not set.

URLSCAN_X_OPENCTI_SCORE_URL.description: The x_opencti_score to use for URL observables and indicators. Defaults to the default score if not set.
